name: IT Alagi
events: 29 Feb 1944 HMS Caledon (Capt. R.F. Nichols, RN) conducted AA gunnery exercises off Alexandria.
These were followed by A/S exercises with the submarine Alagi (T.V.(Lt.) S. Puccini). The Alagi also made a practice attack on HMS Caledon.

Finally HMS Caledon conducted RIX (rangefinding and inclination) exercises with the escort destroyers HMS Catterick (Lt. D.P. Willan, DSC, RN) and HMS Haydon (Lt. R.G.R. Clay, RN) on completion of which they all returned to harbour. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
